pages.label: Random Number Generator
pages.title: Random Number Generator — Pick a Number in Any Range
pages.desc: Generate random numbers between any minimum and maximum. Choose how many, allow or block duplicates, and sort the results. Free, instant, nothing to install.
pages.blurb: Pick a minimum and maximum, choose how many numbers you want, and generate — every number lands inside your range, inclusive of both ends. Turn duplicates off to draw unique numbers (like a raffle), or leave them on for independent picks.
pages.tip: Numbers are drawn with your browser's built-in cryptographic random generator, so each result is genuinely unpredictable. Everything runs on your device — nothing is sent anywhere.

pages.label: Random 1–10
pages.title: Random Number 1 to 10 — Free Generator
pages.desc: Generate a random number from 1 to 10. Draw one or many, with or without duplicates. Instant and free, no signup.
pages.blurb: A random number from 1 to 10, ready the moment you press Generate. Bump up the count to draw several at once, or switch duplicates off to get unique numbers each time.
pages.tip: Need a different range? The Minimum and Maximum boxes are editable — set anything you like and it still works.

pages.label: Random 1–100
pages.title: Random Number 1 to 100 — Free Generator
pages.desc: Generate a random number from 1 to 100. Pick one or several, allow or block duplicates, and sort them. Instant, free, no signup.
pages.blurb: A random number from 1 to 100 on demand. Raise the count to pull a whole set at once, sort them low-to-high, or turn duplicates off for a unique draw.
pages.tip: Want a raffle-style draw with no repeats? Set Allow duplicates to No and the numbers you get back will all be different.

pages.label: Random 1–6
pages.title: Random Number 1 to 6 — Free Generator
pages.desc: Generate a random number from 1 to 6, just like a single die. Roll one or many at once. Instant and free.
pages.blurb: A random number from 1 to 6 — the same odds as one fair six-sided die. Increase the count to get several at once.
pages.tip: Rolling actual dice with sums? The dice roller adds up multiple dice and shows each face — try that instead.

pages.label: Dice Roller
pages.title: Dice Roller — Roll d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, d100 Online
pages.desc: Roll virtual dice online: choose d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20 or d100 and how many. Shows every die and the total. Free, instant, no app.
pages.blurb: Pick your die — from a classic d6 to a d20 or percentile d100 — set how many to roll, and generate. You get every individual result plus the total, so it works for board games and tabletop RPGs alike.
pages.tip: Each die is rolled independently and fairly. The total under the dice is simply the sum of the faces shown above it.

pages.label: Coin Flip
pages.title: Coin Flip — Flip a Coin Online (Heads or Tails)
pages.desc: Flip a virtual coin online — one flip or many at once. Shows the full sequence plus a heads/tails tally. Free, instant, no signup.
pages.blurb: Flip one coin for a quick heads-or-tails call, or flip a whole batch at once to see the sequence and the running tally. Each flip is an independent 50/50.
pages.tip: Flipping many coins is a simple way to settle picks in rounds, or just to watch how close a real 50/50 stays over a handful of tries.

pages.label: Random Letter
pages.title: Random Letter Generator — A to Z
pages.desc: Generate random letters A–Z. Pick how many and choose uppercase, lowercase, or mixed case. Free and instant.
pages.blurb: Draw random letters from A to Z — one, or a whole handful. Choose uppercase, lowercase, or a mix, then generate as many times as you like.
pages.tip: Handy for word games, seating labels, quick codes, or picking a starting letter for a category game.

pages.label: Team Generator
pages.title: Random Team Generator — Split a List Into Fair Teams
pages.desc: Paste a list of names and split them into random teams of even size. Great for gym class, game night, and group projects. Free, instant.
pages.blurb: Paste your names — one per line — choose how many teams you need, and generate. Everyone is shuffled and dealt out so the teams come out as even as possible, with any remainder spread one-per-team.
pages.tip: Press Generate again for a completely fresh shuffle. Nothing is saved or uploaded — the names stay in your browser.

pages.label: Group Generator
pages.title: Random Group Generator — Split People Into Groups
pages.desc: Paste names and split them into random groups of a set size. Perfect for breakout groups and classroom activities. Free and instant.
pages.blurb: Paste your names — one per line — set how many people you want in each group, and generate. Names are shuffled and packed into groups of that size, with a smaller leftover group at the end if the numbers don't divide evenly.
pages.tip: Want a fixed number of teams instead of a fixed group size? Use the team generator — it splits into a set number of teams.

pages.label: List Picker
pages.title: Random List Picker — Pick a Random Item From a List
pages.desc: Paste a list and pick a random item from it. Choose one or several unique picks. Great for decisions and giveaways. Free, instant.
pages.blurb: Paste your options — one per line — and let the picker choose for you. Pull a single winner, or bump the count to draw several unique items at once.
pages.tip: Perfect for choosing what to eat, who goes first, or drawing a giveaway winner. Each item has an equal chance, and picks never repeat within one draw.

pages.label: Color Generator
pages.title: Random Color Generator — Hex Codes With Swatches
pages.desc: Generate random colors with hex codes and live swatches. Pick one or a whole palette at once. Copy the codes. Free and instant.
pages.blurb: Generate random colors — each one shown as a swatch next to its hex code so you can see it and copy it. Draw a single color or a whole strip at once.
pages.tip: Copy the result to grab every hex code as text. Great for mockups, design inspiration, or just picking a surprise color.

pages.label: Yes or No
pages.title: Yes or No Generator — Random Yes/No Answer
pages.desc: Get a random yes or no answer to any question. A fair 50/50 coin-flip decision maker. Free, instant, no signup.
pages.blurb: Type your question if you like, then generate a straight yes or no. It's a fair 50/50 — the same odds as flipping a coin — for when you just need something to decide for you.
pages.tip: This is for fun and quick, low-stakes decisions. For anything that actually matters, trust your own judgement over a coin flip.
